“What... who are you...”

“My name is Rashida. And I don’t like being grabbed. Put me down.”

As the tiny woman complained, Stephen saw motion on the ground. Two other tiny women were watching from a short distance, both wearing the same silver suits.

“Are those your friends?”

“Yes. Now put me down so I can get back to them.”

Stephen ignored Rashida’s request to be freed and quickly shoved her into his jacket pocket. He quickly darted towards the other women and reached out with both hands before they had time to react. His left hand quickly wrapped around a chubby blonde, his right hand around a tiny Asian woman. He transferred the blonde into the hand with the Asian, easily able to hold both women. His left hand went into his pocket and fished out Rashida.

“How did you get so small?”

“We’re scared” said the other.

“Who are you?” Lexi said “what are you?”

“Okay but why are you small and why are you naked and where are your parents?”

The two sat down in sadness.

“It started about two months ago after we had our 12th birthday I’m Sara btw and this is Martina. We decided to spend the afternoon at the park before we decided to try out this brand new trail.”

“But once we did, we came across a Keep Out electric area and climbed the fence”

“And when we did we got shocked.” Sara said

“We didn’t get hurt but over the next month or so our clothes started to get looser and looser until about a month ago we stopped shrinking at this size”

“Our parents didn’t want to take care of us anymore, so they put us in this box and left us here” the two naked girls once again started crying.

Lexi felt bad for Sara and Martina. It must be hard to have your life change so drastically only to be abandoned by your parents.

What does Lexi do now?

12211.content:
"I can't believe your parents did this to you." Lexi cleans a tear, forming in her left eye and calms. "And you don't have other relatives? Your grandparents or an uncle?"

The twins shook their heads. "Our parents stopped talking to their families years ago." Sara replies.

"And even if we try, last month, they started to tell everybody that we died.' Martina adds.

The blonde teen didn't know what to do, she couldn't just leave them and pretend that nothing happened. "Listen, girls. How about you stay with me?" Lexi proposes.

"Really?" Sarah asks.

"You mean it?" Martina adds.

Lexi nods. "Of course." Suddenly, the three of them hear a horn. "Shit, it's my mom. I'm sorry for this, girls." She quickly grabs the twins and drops them inside one of her bags.

"Hey, sweetie, hurry. I don't want to miss my favourite show." Lexi's mom, Lucy, calls.

"Coming, mom." The blonde girl grabs the bags and moves forward.

A few minutes later, Lexi arrives to her home.

"Okay, dear. We made it on time." Lucy says. "Do you want me to help you with your bags?" She extends her hand.

"No!" Lexi intervenes and takes them first. Noticing that she overreacted, she giggles. "Thanks, but I'm excited to try my new shoes on." She closes the door of the van and runs inside the house.

After she enters her bedroom, she locks the door and takes out the twins. "Are you okay?"

"Yeah." Martina recovers her breath.

"We almost don't make it." Sara comments. "Why you want us to stay hidden?"

Lexi sighed. "The truth is that.....

“My brother is almost 14 and he is very interested in girls right now. He would defiantly go nuts if he saw you two. Who knows what he could do? Additionally, he is a bit of a nerd and can be very creepy at times. He might look at you two the same way a scientist would look at a rare interesting animal he found in the woods. One more thing, he has a large collection of animals and carnivores plants in his bedroom and I do not want him introducing you both to one of them. Also he has some even creepier friends and I think he might be a Devil worshiper,” Lexi says worried.

“Geez you think he would feed us to something, sell us, or eat us himself?” Sarah asks.

“That or something even worse.” Lexi responds.

“Like what?” Martina asks.

“You don’t want to know.” Lexi says. “Good thing he never comes into my room,” or so she thinks.

Lexi walks over and places the box they came in next to an old small dollhouse located on her bedroom desk. She then pores some warm water into a cereal bowel, gives them each a small piece of a bar of soap and tells them both to take bath. Thirty minutes later, the twins finish their bath, and Lexi uses a hair dryer on the lowest setting to dry them off. Not having any doll clothes still around, Lexi gives them each a tissue. Lexi then puts them to bed in the dollhouse as she too goes to sleep. As Lexi goes to sleep, she hears the twins go to bed on the soft, miniature bed she happens to have.

The next morning, Lexi gets up and sees the twins are still fast asleep inside the dollhouse on the miniature bed. The tissues she gave them to wear are now falling apart. She makes a mental note to get some doll clothes later after she gets home from school. Lexi gets ready to go to school, and heads to her bus. Lexi…

1221111.content:
Lexi leaves to go to school leaving the two young adolescents alone for several hours. Thirty minutes after the giantess’s departure, her bedroom door opens, and her younger brother Adam walks into her bedroom having a look around. Adam is a nice looking young teenage boy, but with his glasses on, an observer would think he looks like a stereotypical nerd. Adam quietly sneaks around and opens her underwear drawer. He picks up some of her underwear, a pink panty and sniffs it, “Oh yes, I will enjoy jerking onto this one today.” Adam has been jerking off on his sisters and his mom’s underwear for some time. Unknown his female family members, they are all wearing panties that Adam cam in recently.

As Adam gets ready to leave, he sees something small moving around on the top floor of his sisters own dollhouse. Thinking it was an escaped pet, Adam investigates. He looks closer and notices two half naked action figure size dolls on a miniature bed. The only thing they both seem to be wearing is a torn white shirt or a tissue? “Damn, those dolls look realistic,” he thought, “One of those dolls even has a crack in her ass.”

Just then he sees one turning over, and the other one complaining in a soft, mouse like voice he could barely understand. It cannot be, they are real? Adam reaches in and carefully grabs the bed they are resting on. He carefully looks them over as they slept in amazement. “It cannot be, they are miniature humans, girls.” He continues to look them over, “they must be sisters, identical twins, between eleven to twelve years old.”

All the sudden dozens of ideas passed threw his mind, all bad. “How did they get this small? Can he find whatever caused this and shrink even more people?” All the sick, twisted stories he read online from the now defunct Violent Shrunken Women’s board and other sites came flooding back to him. His cock started to throb as it became hard. His lust is blinding him now, so he gently places their tiny bed back in the dollhouse. Adam runs to his bedroom and quickly runs back with an empty but clean hamster cage in hand. Adam opens the cage and gently grabs the girls, carefully placing them both in the cage. The two tiny girls gently roll into the cage and luckily enough, they are still sleeping. He secures the cage and carefully cleans up Lexi’s bedroom. As Martina and Sarah slept, he leaves his sisters bedroom, with a look of lustful insanity on his face. As he heads to his bedroom, Adam decides on a cover story for their disappearance if she asks. He would play dumb and tell her that one of his pets escaped again, and he found it inside her bedroom.

Adam runs into his bedroom, turns on his computer and places the cage on his desk. As he gets undressed, he hears a news story from the online website saying, “The unusual rays being emitted from a local star going nova that were detected a few weeks ago are getting stronger and should stop in a month or so. Some undisclosed side effects are being reported around the world, mostly in women and girls. If you notice anything unusual, please call this 1-800 number at once.”

“Eureka, that is it. Those rays coming from that nearby star going nova caused them to shrink. The undisclosed Side effect must be shrinking, among other things. That means there must be other who have shrunk or will shrink all over the place. After I am done with these two, I am going for a hunt.” He whispers to himself with a smirk.
1221111.title: Lexi leaves the twins behind, they are alone?

1221113.content:
“Lexi?”

Sarah was the first to wake. Rising from the cheap, uncomfortable bed, the first thing she noticed was that Lexi didn’t seem to be there.

“Huh, maybe she’s gone to school or something.” She muttered to no one. “Now what?”

Until Lexi got back, they were a bit stuck for things to do. Exploring the house sounded fun on paper, but who knew what dangers were lurking out there? Lexi might’ve have pets or something, who wouldn’t hesitate to eat a small girl, that was for sure.

So what were two girls going to do until then?
1221113.title: Lexi?

12211131.content:
"Good morning, Sarah." Martina yawns. "Where is Lexi?"

"Good morning, Martina." Her twin replies. "She is not around, I think she went to school."

"So, we are alone?"

Sarah nods. "By the way, I want to take a look around the house. Get used to it and see where we could move."

"Sounds good." Martina says. "But, you think we should? Remember Lexi told us about her brother."

"Don't worry about him, we will be safe as long as he doesn't see us and we don't get inside of his room." Sarah responds. "Besides, what if he comes here?"

"You are right." Martina agrees. "I guess it doesn't hurt to know our new home." So, both get out of the dollhouse and climb down the desk.

"Maybe we could help Lexi with her laundry." Martina points to a bra and a pair of panties under Lexi's bed.

"Later." Sarah grabs her twin's hand. "Come on, I want to take a look." The twins run towards the door of the bedroom and crawl under it.

Which bedroom they check first?
12211131.title: Explore the house

122112.content:
The twins were curious for this comment.

"What do you mean?" Sara asks.

"Before we get into that." Lexi says. "I think I haven't introduced myself. I'm Lexi Wheeler."

"Nice to meet you." The twins reply in unison.

"And thanks for taking us with you." Martina says.

Lexi rubs her head. "There's no need to thank me." She sits on the floor. "How about we talk for a bit? That way, we can know each other better."

"Sure." Sara replies.

"What do you want to know?" Martina asks.

"First of all, do you guys have anything to differentiate from each other?"

"Yeah, we are identical except for two spots." Martina replied. "I have a mole next to my left eye. Oh, I'm Martina, by the way."

"And I have a mole." Sara blushes. "Here." She points above her crotch.

"I see." Lexi looks to the window. "You know, girls. What I wanted to tell you was that if you could give me a hand?"

"Wait, you really need our help?" Sara responds.

"Even if we are like this?" Martina adds.

"Yes." The blonde teen nods. "To be honest, I love gossip, I want to find out everything about other people. And I thought you two could be perfect. But, only if you agree, I don't want to force you to do anything."

The twins look at each other. "We'll do it."

"Thank you, thank you." Lexi hugs them. "I think I have your first target."
122112.title: I need your help." (Small spies.)

1222.title: A brunette teenager (16)

12223.content:
There were a lot of things Lexi Wheeler expected to see when she opened up that shoebox.

A six inch nude version of one of her classmates was not one of them.

Lexi knew Habiba Johnson, of course. They didn't run around in the same circles, but neither one of them ran around in the popular circles. Lexi ran around in the "Meg Griffin" circles, the one with all the plain girls in it. Habiba ran in the smart weird girl circles. The ones who knew computer code and science fiction movies and all that stuff.

Habiba was probably the least weird of that circle, but she was smart. She probably got put into that circle because Habiba's mother made her wear a scarf over her hair when she went to school, even when it was hot.

Habiba was okay looking, Lexi thought, but not anywhere pretty enough to catch a popular guy's eyes.

Except the half foot tall Habiba looking up at Lexi wasn't just pretty, she was HOT!

The body this tiny Habiba had looked like it could have stepped out of a centerfold. Her breasts were large and firm, and the rest of her body was tight. Habiba's face was familiar enough that you knew it was Habiba, but there were subtle enough changes to it that made it go from "sort of cute" to "exotic beauty." Habiba's hair was now waist length, and shone with health and lustrousness.

Another thing Lexi noticed was that Habiba didn't have any hair on her body below the neckline. No hair on her arms, no hair on her legs, and certainly no hair THERE!

Lexi started in amazement at Habiba, not processing a single word that the other girl was saying. Lexi found herself reaching for Habiba. The tiny girl tried to wave Lexi off, but it was as if some unknown force was compelling Lexi to pick her classmate up.

As soon as Lexi touched Habiba, there was a flash, and Lexi found herself falling. When she landed, she found herself inside the "shoebox," six inches tall, nude and changed.

Lexi wasn't an ugly girl, but she wasn't a pretty one either.

She still wasn't pretty. She was gorgeous.

Like Habiba, Lexi now had a body any glamour model would kill for. Her blonde hair hung down to her waist, and all her blemishes (and body hair) had vanished.

"I'm sorry, Lexi," Habiba began, clearly heartbroken about what had just happened to Lexi. Habiba began explaining what had happened to her (and now Lexi)
12223.title: Habiba Johnson

You are a man or woman who comes across a 3 to 6 inch tall female and decides to help/keep them.
